'''''Gilgam''''' was a [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] [[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|''Pursuer''-class enforcement ship]] employed by [[K'Armyn Viraxo]] in a mercenary role to intimidate business rivals and defend Viraxo interests against pirates.

==History==
While conducting a hit-and-fade attack against the ''[[Harlequin Station]]'' trading post, the ''Gilgam'' and its sister ship, the ''[[Enkidu]]'', were driven off by an unexpectedly aggressive [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] piloting his family's [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] Corellian light freighter, the ''[[Sabra]]''.

Unlike its sister ship, ''Enkidu'', which continued to harass the Azzameens up to the day of its destruction, the ''Gilgam'' is not known to have participated in any further raids against the Azzameens.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
